_comment_purpose: Project-scoped MCP server registration for the rts code-retrieval daemon. Committed to repo so every contributor's Claude Code session sees the rts MCP tools the same way without per-user `claude mcp add` setup. Precedence is local (~/.claude.json keyed by project path) > project (this file) > user (~/.claude.json) > plugins. A contributor with an explicit local registration overrides this file; for everyone else, this is the default.
_comment_alwaysLoad: alwaysLoad: true promotes mcp__rts__* tools out of Claude Code's deferred-loading surface so they appear in the top-of-prompt tool list every session — no ToolSearch round-trip required. Requires Claude Code v2.1.121+. On older versions the field is silently ignored and the AGENTS.md soft-load directive (call ToolSearch once at session start) remains the fallback path.
_comment_bins: command: "rts-mcp" assumes the binary is on PATH. Build with `cargo build --release -p rts-mcp -p rts-daemon` and put target/release on PATH (or copy to ~/bin), or replace with an absolute path. RTS_DAEMON_BIN tells rts-mcp where to find the daemon binary if it isn't a sibling of rts-mcp on disk.
_comment_workspace: Claude Code does NOT support VS Code's ${workspaceFolder}; it only expands ${ENV_VAR} / ${ENV_VAR:-default}. Claude Code sets CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR to the project root in the spawned server's env, and spawns stdio servers with CWD = project root. ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.} resolves to the worktree root portably across contributors and git worktrees; the `.` fallback covers CC versions/contexts that don't set the var (CWD is the project root anyway).
